title: Cutty Cunningham
compiled_truth: Cutty Cunningham is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (2000-04-07 to 2002-01-09), Cutty Cunningham sent 7 and received 56 emails, totalling 63 interactions. Top correspondents: [Dana Gibbs](people/dana-gibbs) (6), [Stanley Horton](people/stanley-horton) (6), [Susan Ralph](people/susan-ralph) (4), [Steve Duffy](people/steve-duffy) (3), [Joe Richards](people/joe-richards) (3).
